project: i2i - Modelos Ropa Casual y Verano para Chicas Jóvenes
brand_style: Young casual summer fashion, trendy and fresh, Zara/H&M/Mango aesthetic
brand_persona: Accessible premium casual wear for young European women. Zara meets & Other Stories - trendy yet timeless, effortless summer style that travels well. Fresh, approachable, aspirational without being exclusive.
photography_direction: Warm summer daylight with natural shadows. European lifestyle locations - cobblestones, seaside, gardens, terraces. Clothes should look touchable and real. Hair moves with wind. Mood is carefree and joyful.
negative_prompt_default: deformed, watermark, low quality, bad anatomy, flat skin, plastic skin, blurry, artifacts, grid lines, ugly, disfigured, cropped, cut off legs, cut off feet, missing limbs, extra fingers, logo text, brand name visible, vulgar, provocative, revealing, oversexualized, sepia, desaturated, muted colors, vintage filter, color cast, yellowed, faded colors
